West Bengal.context: The current West Bengal Legislative Assembly term expires in 2026. Elections are typically held in several phases between March and May.

Uttar Pradesh.context: The Uttar Pradesh Vidhan Sabha term runs until early 2027. The last elections were held in early 2022.

Maharashtra.context: Maharashtra's legislative assembly term is due to expire in late 2024. Political activity usually intensifies 6 months prior.

Tamil Nadu.context: The Tamil Nadu Assembly term expires in May 2026. Elections are usually held in a single phase.

Karnataka.context: Karnataka last voted in May 2023. The next state election is expected in mid-2028.

Delhi.context: The Delhi Legislative Assembly term expires in February 2025. The schedule is typically announced in January.

Bihar.context: Bihar Assembly elections are due in late 2025. The current term expires in November 2025.

Lok Sabha.context: The 18th Lok Sabha term runs until 2029. General elections are held nationwide every 5 years.
